name: Ringer Golf
address: 1701 C St SW Ste A, Cedar Rapids, IA 52404
about: Ringer Golf is an indoor golf studio in Cedar Rapids, Iowa, featuring Trackman simulator technology. The venue provides a comfortable, climate-controlled environment for golfers to play rounds on virtual courses, practice their swing with real-time data analytics, or enjoy the indoor lounge. Pricing starts at $35 per hour for bay rentals, with options for private events and corporate outings. The facility caters to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to serious players, offering both practice and entertainment in a casual setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Trackman technology provides precise swing and shot data for game improvement
Indoor studio allows year-round play regardless of weather conditions
On-site lounge with TVs and beverages creates a complete golf entertainment experience
Flexible booking options for solo practice or group events

food_and_drink.notes: Beer, seltzers, and sodas available; no liquor served

simulator_hardware.notes: 3 full Trackman simulator bays with gold-standard technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly state whether club rentals are available, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an indoor lounge that serves beer, seltzers, sodas, and light snacks, but does not mention allowing outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the time required for 18 holes, but bay rentals are priced per hour starting at $35.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Ringer Golf welcomes golf players of all ages and experience levels, making it suitable for families and kids.
